name: Youth Drop-in: Open Gym
desc: Ages 11-17.Basketball, volleyball, badminton?  We have them all!  Check out the youth calendar to find out what is being offered each week.  All equipment is provided and no experience or coordination needed -  just a good attitude and desire for fun!

name: Youth Drop-in: Girls Social
desc: Ages 11-17.Crafts, Snacks, Chats. Repeat. Check the activity calendar for our weekly activity. Facilitated by city staff. Just remember...Girls only!

name: Youth Drop-in: Open Gym
desc: Ages 11-17.Basketball, volleyball, badminton?  We have them all!  Check out the youth calendar to find out what is being offered each week.  All equipment is provided and no experience or coordination needed -  just a good attitude and desire for fun!

name: Youth Drop-in: Youth Night
desc: Ages 11-17.The entire centre is open for Youth Only. Gym, Weight Room(if staff available), Games Room, Arts and Crafts, and Food. There's something for everyone!

name: Spring Break 2026 - Extended Play
desc: Lots of before and after camp activities and games will keep kids entertained ....perfect for working parents.

name: Pilates Mat Class
desc: Challenge your body and mind with Pilates Mat classes. This program will introduce basic Pilates movements for beginners along with more challenging exercises for those with Pilates experience. name: Spin & Yoga
desc: 60 minutesModerate IntensityLow Impact30 minutes of cardio spin to burn calories and make you sweat- followed by 30 minutes of relaxing Yoga poses to help elongate and stretch your muscles, strengthen your core and limber up!

name: Friday Mash-up
desc: 60 minutesModerate IntensityModerate Impact Join us for Friday Fun Day!  This class is a mash-up of old-school aerobics, cardio dance and strength building exercises. name: Table Tennis (16+yrs)
desc: Recreational Table Tennis is open to all skill levels from beginner to advanced. • Up to 8 tables are available• Double play and rotation of players are required if busy• 24 person per half gym

name: Parent & Tot Roaming Rascal
desc: Introduce your child to active living and learning through play at an early age.Participate together in Parent and Tot Roaming Rascal sessions, where your child can run, jump and enjoy play gym equipment and meet other families in your neighbourhood.

name: Gentle-Fit
desc: 60 minutesLow IntensityLow ImpactA low-impact fitness class for all ages and abilities focusing on enhancing flexibility, strength, endurance and coordination. Using light weights and chairs (as needed for balance), participants will be led through a variety of exercises to high energy music. No mat

name: Zumba Gold Express ®
desc: 45 minutesModerate IntensityModerate-ImpactThis modified Zumba class recreates Zumba moves at a lower intensity designed to meet the needs of older adults or those with physical and/or mental impairments that would benefit from a slower-paced class.  No dance experience required, suitable for all fi

name: Pickleball (16+yrs)
desc: Recreational Pickleball open to all skill levels from beginner to advance•Double play and rotation of players is required if the session is full•18 person per half gym or 32 for full gymThis class is registration only. Drop-ins are allowed if available.

name: Spin & Stretch
desc: 60 minutesModerate-High IntensityLow Impact30 minutes of cardio spin to burn calories and make you sweat- followed by 30 minutes of dynamic stretches to help elongate your muscles, strengthen your core and limber up!

name: Basketball (16+yrs)
desc: Recreation Basketball all skill levels welcome from beginner to advance.-20 spots for 5 on 5 play with a rotating group per half gym or 30 for full gym-If full, scores go to 7 points. Winners stay on for a maximum of 2 wins.

name: Wheelchair Basketball*
desc: Learn to play wheelchair basketball. Focus on basic movement and wheelchair skills. Ideal for children, teens and adults who use manual wheelchairs. All equipment provided (wheelchairs are available for able-bodied registrants). Drop-ins welcome if space permits. $8/visit per person.

name: 3D Print a Flower Pot for Mothers Day (6-14yrs)*

name: Aquafit Deep Water
desc: Aquafit is an excellent fitness class in the water for all ages! Instructors are trained in the latest techniques in providing safe aquatic exercises to improve flexibility, aerobic capacity, muscular strength and endurance. Deep-water participants must be comfortable in deep water.

name: Aquafit Shallow Water
desc: Aquafit is an excellent fitness class in the water! Components include a warm up, aerobics, muscle conditioning exercises and a cool down. Water exercise exerts less impact to the joints and is suitable for swimmers and non-swimmers.
